title: Why LLCs Are More than Just a Legal Shield
description: When entrepreneurs and small business owners consider legal structures, Limited Liability Companies (LLCs) often stand out due to their enticing promise of liability protection. However, an LLC goes beyond being just a barrier between personal and business liabilities. Let's delve deeper into the multifaceted advantages of forming an LLC including taxation, management flexibility, and estate planning benefits.

title: American Academy of Estate Planning Attorneys
description: Leading-edge estate planning resources and one-on-one mentoring from nationally-recognized legal experts.
